top_signals.title: Feds seek lower prison term for $100M New Jersey deli fraudster — but some reasons why are hidden
top_signals.summary: James Patten is the third person who will be sentenced in the stock manipulation scheme related to Hometown International, a company that owned just one deli.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
